items.title: Mount Kilauea Halemaʻumaʻu eruption on Hawaii's Big Island has resumed
items.author: Associated Press
items.content:
<article>Mount Kilauea on Hawaii's Big Island has resumed its on-and-off eruptions, which have been captivating residents and visitors for nearly a year.  The eruption is currently contained within Hawaii Volcanoes National Park. 

Subscribe: http://smarturl.it/AssociatedPress
Read more: https://apnews.com​

This video may be available for archive licensing via https://newsroom.ap.org/home</article>

items.title: San Diego considers $30 million settlement in police-involved shooting death of Black teen
items.author: Associated Press
items.content:
<article>The San Diego city attorney’s office has agreed to pay $30 million to the family of a 16-year-old youth who was fatally shot by police last January in what would be one of the largest settlements of a police-involved killing case in U.S. history. Konoa Wilson was Black, and the family alleges the shooting was an act of racial violence.

Subscribe: http://smarturl.it/AssociatedPress
Read more: https://apnews.com​

This video may be available for archive licensing via https://newsroom.ap.org/home</article>

items.title: Mass shooting at a South African bar leaves 11 dead, including 3 children
items.author: Associated Press
items.content:
<article>A mass shooting carried out Saturday by multiple suspects in an unlicensed bar near the South African capital left at least 11 people dead, police said. The victims included three children aged 3, 12 and 16.

Subscribe: http://smarturl.it/AssociatedPress
Read more: https://apnews.com​

This video may be available for archive licensing via https://newsroom.ap.org/home</article>

items.title: A third trip to Pandora for 'Avatar: Fire and Ash' stars | AP interview
items.author: Associated Press
items.content:
<article>James Cameron's "Avatar: Fire and Ash" lands in theaters Dec. 19 — 16 years after the sci-fi franchise's landmark first entry and seven years after most of its stars completed their performance capture work. As they began a globe-trotting publicity tour, AP entertainment editor Ryan Pearson sat down in Los Angeles with Cameron and actors Zoe Saldaña, Sigourney Weaver, Stephen Lang, Sam Worthington, Oona Chaplin, Trinity Jo-Li Bliss, Jack Champion and Bailey Bass. They shared stories of their yearslong journey to Pandora, connecting to their characters, switching frame rates in the two sequels and their hopes for "Avatar" 4 and 5. #avatar #avatarfireandash #jamescameron #zoesaldana 

___ In this video ___
00:00 start
01:05 Zoe Saldaña interview
07:01 Sigourney Weaver interview
13:01 James Cameron interview
20:48 Stephen Lang, Sam Worthington, Oona Chaplin interview
28:46 Trinity Jo-Li Bliss, Jack Champion, Bailey Bass interview</article>

items.title: Overnight exchange of fire along the Afghan-Pakistan border kills 5 and wounds 8, officials say
items.author: Associated Press
items.content:
<article>An overnight exchange of fire between Afghan forces and Pakistani troops along the countries’ tense border killed five Afghan civilians and wounded five others, while three civilians were also wounded on the Pakistani side, officials from the two countries said Saturday.

Subscribe: http://smarturl.it/AssociatedPress
Read more: https://apnews.com​

This video may be available for archive licensing via https://newsroom.ap.org/home</article>

items.title: Firefighters tackle a blaze in Lutsk after Russia attacks Ukraine with drones and missiles
items.author: Associated Press
items.content:
<article>Russia unleashed a major missile and drone barrage on Ukraine overnight into Saturday, after U.S. and Ukrainian officials said they’ll meet on Saturday for a third day of talks aimed at ending the nearly 4-year-old war. 

Subscribe: http://smarturl.it/AssociatedPress
Read more: https://apnews.com​

This video may be available for archive licensing via https://newsroom.ap.org/home</article>

items.title: Derrick Henry expects physical game vs. Steelers for first place in AFC North
items.author: Associated Press
items.content: <article>Ravens five-time Pro Bowl running back Derrick Henry discusses Baltimore’s upcoming game against the Pittsburgh Steelers for first place in the AFC North, how he’s sustained excellence for a decade in the NFL and being nominated for the Walter Payton Man of the Year award.</article>

items.title: Princess of Wales joined by Eugene Levy and Kate Winslet at 'Together at Christmas' carol service
items.author: Associated Press
items.content:
<article>The Princess of Wales hosted her annual 'Together at Christmas' carol service at Westminster Abbey on Friday. Other members of the royal family including Prince William and the pair's children attended the event along with special guests such as Kate Winslet, Chiwetel Ejiofor and Eugene Levy. 

Subscribe: http://smarturl.it/AssociatedPress
Read more: https://apnews.com​

This video may be available for archive licensing via https://newsroom.ap.org/home</article>

items.title: At least 12 homes damaged or destroyed in wildfire north of Sydney, Australia
items.author: Associated Press
items.content:
<article>At least 12 homes were damaged or destroyed after a wildfire swept through a small coastal area north of Sydney, Australia, officials said on Saturday. Temperatures in Sydney topped 40 degrees Celsius (104 degrees) and heatwave warnings were issued across multiple parts of the New South Wales state.

Subscribe: http://smarturl.it/AssociatedPress
Read more: https://apnews.com​

This video may be available for archive licensing via https://newsroom.ap.org/home</article>

items.title: A-listers gather for 'Women in Cinema' celebration at Red Sea International Film Festival
items.author: Associated Press
items.content:
<article>Kirsten Dunst, Naomie Harris, Rita Ora, Jessica Alba, Adrien Brody and Riz Ahmed were among the stars in Jeddah, Saudi Arabia, for an event spotlighting female filmmakers and artists from across the globe. (Dec 6)

items.title: Atlanta church draws young adults with fiery sermons and vibrant worship
items.author: Associated Press
items.content: <article>An Atlanta church with a viral pastor has grown from less than 200 weekly churchgoers in 2023 to about 6,000 today. Many in attendance are young people hungry for 2819 Church's riveting worship and Pastor Philip Anthony Mitchell's intensity.</article>

items.title: Atlanta church draws young adults with fiery sermons and vibrant worship
items.author: Associated Press
items.content:
<article>Atlanta’s 2819 Church and its viral pastor has grown from less than 200 weekly churchgoers in 2023 to about 6,000 today. Lines packed with young people snake outside the church before service as hundreds wait to hear Pastor Philip Anthony Mitchell. (AP Video/Jessie Wardarski)

Subscribe: http://smarturl.it/AssociatedPress
Read more: https://apnews.com​

This video may be available for archive licensing via https://newsroom.ap.org/home</article>

items.title: The work behind this season's opening opera at La Scala Milan - AP explains
items.author: Associated Press
items.content:
<article>The theater lights dim, the auditorium falls silent, the curtain rises and the orchestra directed by Riccardo Chailly begins to play. After months of work at Milan's Teatro Alla Scala, one of the most famous opera houses in the world, everything is ready for what traditionally marks the start of a new season: December 7th.

Subscribe: http://smarturl.it/AssociatedPress
Read more: https://apnews.com​

This video may be available for archive licensing via https://newsroom.ap.org/home</article>

items.title: Repatriated Somalia migrant tells of brutal experiences on ill-fated journey to a new life
items.author: Associated Press
items.content:
<article>Somali migrant Mohamed Abdi Awale endured horrors on an ill-fated journey across Africa to seek a better life in the West — but he's determined to try again one day, even aiming for the U.S. despite increasing restrictions. (AP video by Mohamed Sheikh Nor)

Subscribe: http://smarturl.it/AssociatedPress
Read more: https://apnews.com​
